data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The absence of evidence confirming the ability to scan for availability and book on the spot indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
